text:
Written in the setting of great history, great change and great
                                                                                                                    challenge, this book is suitable for economic workers, college teach-
                                                                                                                    ers and students as it contains a systematic study of the theory and
                                                                                                                    practice of development-oriented finance that has evolved along with
                                                                                                                    China’s reform and opening up, and an in-depth analysis of the ideo-
                                                                                                                    logical basis, theoretical contents, operating principles and innova-
                                                                                                                    tive development of Chinese-style development-oriented finance. Hopefully, the publication of this book will promote further discus-
                                                                                                                    sions and researches on China’s modern economic and financial
                                                                                                                    systems and in turn the sustainable development of the Chinese
                                                                                                                    economy and the world economy at large.
